untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental/corporate action data not available in technical indicators: (1) 'new product/service launched within last 12 months' — requires corporate event tracking; (2) 'mutual fund sponsorship 5-15%' — requires institutional holdings data; (3) 'revenue growth from new offering >15% YoY' — requires earnings/revenue data; (4) 'market leadership position (top 3 in category)' — requires competitive ranking data; (5) 'product market share plateaus for 2+ quarters' — requires product-level sales tracking. This is a fundamental/event-driven signal that cannot be expressed using only price-action and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal SCHWAGER_DRY_0_0 is fundamentally incompatible with technical-only backtest engine. It requires access to: corporate event calendars, institutional ownership databases, quarterly earnings/revenue breakdowns by product line, and competitive market share data. Recommend implementing this signal in a fundamental/multi-asset data backtest framework or adding data connectors for corporate actions and institutional holdings.
